messages.content:
翻译：在5、6月份bug数有明显增加，主要源于：
1. 大量联运相关需求上线
2. 较多入驻需求上线，且本季度入驻是公会产品侧的重点，QA进行了集中测试

Translation: There was a significant increase in the number of bugs in May and June, mainly due to:
1. A large number of online game-related requirements.
2. A significant number of onboarding requirements, with a focus on guild products in this quarter. QA conducted centralized testing.
翻译：- bug总数相较Q1有所增加（74 -> 122），但在Q2内，呈下降趋势（46 -> 46 -> 30）
Translation: - The total number of bugs has increased compared to Q1 (74 -> 122), but within Q2, there has been a downward trend (46 -> 46 -> 30).
翻译 主要源于Agency侧大量复杂需求上线
Translation: The main reason for this is the large number of complex requirements being launched on the Agency side.
翻译 - 红线bug数量在6月有明显上升，主要集中在Wallet侧
Translation: - The number of critical bugs significantly increased in June, mainly concentrated on the Wallet side.

翻译 总结: basically inline 0.6
- 质量指标体系建设：线上线下质量的大部分指标确定了收集方式平台质量指标数据源 。支付业务的异常需求指标（bug估分比异常）还没有统一的收集方式，需要进行统一
- E2E覆盖：整体基本 on track。其中Arena、Data、Wallet侧完成了各自的覆盖率目标，Agency和Money达成大部分目标Platform E2E Construction Progress Alignment - 6.12 
- 监控归因：对4种核心报警场景完成搭建，能够一次性聚合Slardar信息，并查询TCE发布记录，具备一定程度的归因能力 监控归因提效专项 - One Pager 
问题:
- 监控归因系统发现有不能稳定收到卡片的问题，且在开发过程中发现兼容各业务的报警配置存在较高的复杂度，暂未在业务中正式落地

Translation: Summary: basically inline 0.6
- Quality Metrics System Construction: The collection methods for most of the quality metrics for online and offline quality have been determined as platform quality metric data sources. However, there is no unified collection method for abnormal requirement metrics (bug estimation deviation) in the payment business, which needs to be unified.
- E2E Coverage: Overall, it is basically on track. Arena, Data, and Wallet sides have achieved their respective coverage goals, while Agency and Money have achieved most of their goals. Platform E2E Construction Progress Alignment - 6.12
- Monitoring Attribution: The setup for the four core alarm scenarios has been completed, which can aggregate Slardar information at once and query TCE release records, demonstrating a certain level of attribution capability. Monitoring Attribution Efficiency Enhancement Special Project - One Pager
Issues:
- The monitoring attribution system has found that there are issues with not stably receiving cards. Additionally, during the development process, it was discovered that the complexity of configuring alarms compatible with various businesses is relatively high, and it has not been formally implemented in the business yet.
翻译 - 监控归因系统发现有不能稳定收到卡片的问题，且在开发过程中发现兼容各业务的报警配置存在较高的复杂度，暂未在业务中正式落地

Translation: The monitoring attribution system has identified an issue with unstable receipt of cards, and during the development process, it was found that there is a high complexity in configuring alarm settings compatible with various businesses. As a result, it has not yet been officially implemented in the business.
翻译 在4月bug数量有显著增加，但大部分为历史遗留问题，无明显异常
Translation: There was a significant increase in the number of bugs in April, but most of them were historical legacy issues and there were no obvious abnormalities.

翻译   - 质量指标体系建设：统一各业务的质量指标，与QA侧合作实现数据的高效采集方案，并实现告警响应率的定期高效统计能力
  - E2E 覆盖：各平台严重问题覆盖率100%，核心链路覆盖率>60%，并完成其流水线的接入
  - 报警归因提效专项：
    - 监控归因至少在Agency、Arena、Wallet的核心报警场景落地
    - 搭建自动化响应能力，支持自动拉群拉人，推动完成报警的完整解决；产出手动调用归因服务的方案
    - 与Slardar保持合作，应用其智能报警能力，并推动Slardar支持业务编辑报警卡片

Translation: 
- Quality Metrics System Construction: Establishing unified quality metrics for each business and collaborating with QA to implement efficient data collection solutions, as well as achieving the ability to regularly and efficiently calculate alarm response rates.
- E2E Coverage: Achieving a coverage rate of 100% for severe issues across all platforms, with a core link coverage rate of >60% and completing integration into their respective pipelines.
- Alarm Attribution Efficiency Enhancement Special Project:
  - Implementing monitoring attribution in key alarm scenarios in Agency, Arena, and Wallet.
  - Building automated response capabilities to support automatic grouping and notification of relevant personnel, facilitating the complete resolution of alarms, and producing a solution for manual invocation of attribution services.
  - Maintaining collaboration with Slardar and leveraging its intelligent alarm capabilities, as well as promoting Slardar to support business-driven alarm card editing.
翻译 使机器人初步具备报警流程管理能力，能够提醒用户及时响应报警并引导其解决

Translation: Enable the robot to have preliminary alarm process management capabilities, allowing it to remind users to respond to alarms in a timely manner and guide them towards resolving the issues.
chrome插件的用户数是怎么算的
Chrome插件的用户数是通过Chrome Web Store中的统计数据来计算的。具体来说，Chrome Web Store会记录每个插件的安装数量，并将其作为用户数的衡量标准。当用户安装插件后，Chrome Web Store会将其添加到插件的安装计数中。每当插件被卸载或更新时，安装计数也会相应地更新。因此，插件的用户数是指已安装插件的用户数量，即累积的安装计数。
有官方文档么

是的，谷歌Chrome开发者文档中提供了关于Chrome插件用户统计的相关信息。下面是一些相关的文档链接：
- [Chrome插件统计数据概览](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/webstore/user_stats/)
- [Chrome插件统计数据API](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/webstore/analytics/)

这些文档可以提供更详细的信息，包括如何访问和解释插件的用户数统计数据。
第一个文档打不开

非常抱歉，这里是更新的链接：
- [Chrome插件统计数据概览](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/webstore/user_stats/overview)

请点击链接查看关于Chrome插件用户统计的概述文档。
非常抱歉，似乎我的链接提供有误。很遗憾，我无法立即提供确切的官方文档链接。不过，您可以尝试在谷歌开发者文档中搜索"Chrome插件用户统计"来找到相关文档。再次抱歉给您带来不便。
